subject: Choate Rosemary Hall "Taylor"
body:
Jeffrey,
I made a mistake and forgot to turn in Taylor's Choate  tuition in April,
May I have your approval for this, so I may have Rich Expedite  payment, 
Total is $42,170.00
Thank you, 
is this aproved?
 
Larry Visoski
